title: Inverse Design of Nano-Photonic Sensors
description: Student Research Project (SRP) on computational inverse design of nano-photonic devices for colorimetric fluid sensing. Applying machine learning to optimise device geometry, replacing expensive forward electromagnetic simulations with learned surrogate models.

title: P-bits Probabilistic Solver for Max-Cut
description: Developing a Python-based probabilistic solver using p-bits (probabilistic bits) to tackle the Max-Cut problem — a hard combinatorial optimisation challenge. Explores stochastic computing approaches inspired by neuromorphic and quantum-approximate hardware.
